shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/search-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-tooltip touchstart delayed show scroll resize" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "touch" src README.md docs | head -100 && rg -n "openEvents|touch" src/components src/index.tsx README.md docs/versioned_docs | head -160'

/bin/bash -lc "git remote -v && git branch -a --contains HEAD && git log --all -S'touchstart' --oneline -- src/components/Tooltip || true && git log --all -S'handleScrollResize' --oneline -- src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx || true"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff --stat && git status --short && git diff --check && nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '345,375p;474,488p' && nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts | sed -n '80,91p' && nl -ba src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js | sed -n '85,135p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In react-tooltip, delegated hover/focus opening must also register a document-level touchstart handler so touch-only anchors can open without synthetic mouse/focus events. Global scroll/resize close handlers must clear tooltipShowDelayTimerRef before returning, otherwise a delayed show can reopen the tooltip after the close. Regression tests cover both behaviors in src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js." -t "react-tooltip touch and delayed-show close fixes" --unit-type learning -l "react-tooltip" -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
